questions.question:
A custom resource installation bundle in namespace `operator-lab` is incomplete. A CRD named `widgets.training.cka.io`, a Deployment named `widget-operator`, and a custom resource named `sample-widget` already exist, but all three are broken.

Repair the bundle so that:
- the CRD group is `training.cka.io`
- version `v1alpha1` is served and storage
- kind `Widget`, plural `widgets`, and scope `Namespaced` are used
- the CRD schema requires `spec.image` (string) and `spec.replicas` (integer)
- Deployment `widget-operator` in namespace `operator-lab` uses image `busybox:1.36.1`
- the operator Deployment runs exactly one replica and its container command sleeps for `3600` seconds
- custom resource `sample-widget` in namespace `operator-lab` uses apiVersion `training.cka.io/v1alpha1`
- `sample-widget` sets `spec.image` to `nginx:1.25.5`
- `sample-widget` sets `spec.replicas` to `2`
- save the repaired CRD manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/widget-crd.yaml`

Do not install OLM and do not add extra cluster-wide controllers or RBAC beyond this bundle.

verification.description: The CRD uses the intended API group, kind, scope, and schema contract
The operator Deployment uses the intended image, replica count, and long-running command
The custom resource uses the intended spec and the repaired CRD manifest is exported
